'''zopachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:measured|measured]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:measured|measured]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zopachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zopachithi|zopachithi]] || [[word:zopachiji|zopachiji]] || [[word:zopachishi|zopachishi]] || [[word:zopachiki|zopachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zopachuthuthu|zopachuthuthu]] || [[word:zopachujuju|zopachujuju]] || [[word:zopachushushu|zopachushushu]] || [[word:zopachukuku|zopachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zopachuthu|zopachuthu]] || [[word:zopachuju|zopachuju]] || [[word:zopachushu|zopachushu]] || [[word:zopachuku|zopachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zopachufthuf|zopachufthuf]] || [[word:zopachufjuf|zopachufjuf]] || [[word:zopachufshuf|zopachufshuf]] || [[word:zopachufkuf|zopachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zopachethe|zopachethe]] || [[word:zopacheje|zopacheje]] || [[word:zopacheshe|zopacheshe]] || [[word:zopacheke|zopacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zopachothotho|zopachothotho]] || [[word:zopachojojo|zopachojojo]] || [[word:zopachoshosho|zopachoshosho]] || [[word:zopachokoko|zopachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zopachotho|zopachotho]] || [[word:zopachojo|zopachojo]] || [[word:zopachosho|zopachosho]] || [[word:zopachoko|zopachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zopachofthof|zopachofthof]] || [[word:zopachofjof|zopachofjof]] || [[word:zopachofshof|zopachofshof]] || [[word:zopachofkof|zopachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfthĂŻf|zopachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfjĂŻf|zopachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfshĂŻf|zopachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfkĂŻf|zopachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zopachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zopachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zopachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zopachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfthĂŻf|zopachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfjĂŻf|zopachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfshĂŻf|zopachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfkĂŻf|zopachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfthĂŻf|zopachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfjĂŻf|zopachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfshĂŻf|zopachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zopachĂŻfkĂŻf|zopachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zopachĂŠthĂŠ|zopachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zopachĂŠjĂŠ|zopachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zopachĂŠshĂŠ|zopachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zopachĂŠkĂŠ|zopachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zopachathatha|zopachathatha]] || [[word:zopachajaja|zopachajaja]] || [[word:zopachashasha|zopachashasha]] || [[word:zopachakaka|zopachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zopachatha|zopachatha]] || [[word:zopachaja|zopachaja]] || [[word:zopachasha|zopachasha]] || [[word:zopachaka|zopachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zopachafthaf|zopachafthaf]] || [[word:zopachafjaf|zopachafjaf]] || [[word:zopachafshaf|zopachafshaf]] || [[word:zopachafkaf|zopachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zopachasha|zopachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zopachshĂ«sha|zopachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zopachrosha|zopachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zopachmusha|zopachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zopachyasha|zopachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozopachnkshĂ«sha|gozopachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozopachnkrosha|gozopachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozopachnkmusha|gozopachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozopachnkyasha|gozopachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zopapachasha|zopapachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zopapachshĂ«sha|zopapachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zopapachrosha|zopapachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zopapachmusha|zopapachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zopapachyasha|zopapachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozopapachnkshĂ«sha|gozopapachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozopapachnkrosha|gozopapachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozopapachnkmusha|gozopapachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozopapachnkyasha|gozopapachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zepĂŠchasha|zepĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zepĂŠchshĂ«sha|zepĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zepĂŠchrosha|zepĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zepĂŠchmusha|zepĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zepĂŠchyasha|zepĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozepĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gozepĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozepĂŠchnkrosha|gozepĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozepĂŠchnkmusha|gozepĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozepĂŠchnkyasha|gozepĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zopfachasha|zopfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zopfachshĂ«sha|zopfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zopfachrosha|zopfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zopfachmusha|zopfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zopfachyasha|zopfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozopfachnkshĂ«sha|gozopfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozopfachnkrosha|gozopfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozopfachnkmusha|gozopfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozopfachnkyasha|gozopfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
